message:
chore: Bump version to 1.3.13 and fix TypeScript import

- Bump version from 1.3.12 to 1.3.13
- Fix Database import in MCP server (remove 'type' keyword)
- Prepare for npm publish with MCP command fix

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "agentdb",
-  "version": "1.3.12",
+  "version": "1.3.13",
   "description": "AgentDB - Frontier Memory Features with MCP Integration: Causal reasoning, reflexion memory, skill library, and automated learning. 150x faster vector search. Full Claude Desktop support via Model Context Protocol.",
   "type": "module",
   "main": "dist/index.js",
@@ -66,9 +66,9 @@
   "dependencies": {
     "@modelcontextprotocol/sdk": "^1.20.1",
     "@xenova/transformers": "^2.17.2",
-    "better-sqlite3": "^11.7.0",
     "chalk": "^5.3.0",
     "commander": "^12.1.0",
+    "sql.js": "^1.13.0",
     "zod": "^3.25.76"
   },
   "devDependencies": {
@@ -90,6 +90,6 @@
     "LICENSE"
   ],

-    "sql.js": "^1.13.0"
+    "better-sqlite3": "^11.7.0"
